Hero.name: Hiroki Kusaka
Hero.description: I'm currently studying to become a software engineer, with a strong interest in JavaScript and its ecosystem. I'm actively developing applications using TypeScript and React for frontend development and Express.js for backend development.My strength is my ability to deeply immerse myself in whatever interests me. During my school days, I dedicated myself passionately to learning English, and now I'm fully engaged in programming. Once I start something, I commit fully, which is why I'm currently maintaining a daily routine of seven hours of programming practice.Thank you for your time. I look forward to connecting!

Skills.mySkills: React, Typescript, Next.js, Express.js, Node.js, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB, Redux, Docker

nativbaseApp.title: 言語学習アプリ
nativbaseApp.description: Nativbase is a desktop web app for language exchange. Its core features are random video calls and user search: users can join filtered random matching, connect through real-time video calls, and search language partners with list/map views, nearby sorting, active-user sorting, and video-call availability.

randomVideoCall.title: Random Video Call
randomVideoCall.description: Users can enter a random matching queue with filters and start a real-time video call once a compatible partner is found.

search.title: Search Feature
search.description: Users can search language partners with filters, switch between list and map views, and sort by nearby, active, or video-call-ready users.

chat.title: Chat Feature
chat.description: Users can continue conversations through chat, keeping communication active before and after video calls.
